fallback_mathlib_candidates.search_excerpt: /-- We can define `esymm σ R n` by summing over a subtype instead of over `powerset_len`. -/ theorem esymm_eq_sum_subtype (n : ℕ) : esymm σ R n = ∑ t : {s : Finset σ // #s = n}, ∏ i ∈ (t : Finset σ), X i :=
